chart.prompt: Top 10 Produkte nach Umsatz aus Rechnungspositionen seit Jahresanfang, absteigend
chart.sql_string:
SELECT
    p.product_number AS "SKU",
    p.product_name_de AS "Produkt",
    COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ii.net_price::NUMERIC(23,8) * ii.quantity::NUMERIC(23,8) * (1 - COALESCE(ii.discount, 0)::NUMERIC(23,8))), 2), 0) AS "Umsatz"
FROM invoices i
JOIN invoice_items ii
    ON i.invoice_id = ii.invoice_id
LEFT JOIN products p
    ON ii.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE i.date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND i.date <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND i.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created')
GROUP BY
    p.product_number,
    p.product_name_de
ORDER BY "Umsatz" DESC
LIMIT 10;

en.title: Top 10 products (YTD)
en.description: Best-selling products by revenue year-to-date from invoice line items — assortment-management staple for ecommerce SMBs.

de.title: Top-10 Produkte (YTD)
de.description: Umsatzstärkste Produkte seit Jahresbeginn aus Rechnungspositionen — Sortiments-Management-Klassiker für E-Commerce-Mittelstand.
